## Summary

Describe the smallest change this pull request makes.

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR does not add runtime unless explicitly approved by a future Gate.
- [ ] This PR does not create `outputs/quest_snapshot.md`.
- [ ] This PR does not add PDF, PNG, or screenshot automation.
- [ ] This PR does not add snapshot comparison.
- [ ] This PR does not add scoring or drift scoring.
- [ ] This PR does not add external APIs or market research automation.
- [ ] This PR preserves Human Seat.
- [ ] This PR preserves the Do-Not-Do Boundary.
- [ ] This PR updates `STATUS.md` if governance state changes.

## Notes

Do not include secrets, credentials, private repo content, local paths, personal information, or unpublished strategy.
